summary: Comprehensive testing of Drops Curated v3 - 14 brands expansion. All 28 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly including 14 brand filters, search, product detail, and full subscription flow.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 4,951 scraped products from 14 brands
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional with 14 brands. Backend has 28 passing API tests covering: scrape status (14 brands verification), search by brand name (all 14 brands), cross-brand search (jacket, t-shirt, hoodie), product detail for new brands (Huemn, Urban Monkey, Farak), and full subscription flow (OTP, payment, membership). Frontend has all pages working: Landing (4951+ products, 14 brands monitored), Browse (14 brand filters with product counts, search, category filters), Product Detail (works for all new brands), Subscribe (4-step flow with membership card). Responsive design verified on mobile (375px) with all 14 brand filters visible.

search_api.house_of_koala: PASS - Returns House of Koala products
search_api.veg_non_veg: PASS - Returns Veg Non Veg products
search_api.crep_dog_crew: PASS - Returns Crep Dog Crew products
search_api.cross_brand_jacket: PASS - Returns products from multiple brands

landing_page.hero_section: PASS - 'Never Miss a Drop Again' heading

browse_page.14_brand_filters: PASS - All 14 brands visible with product counts

product_detail_page.farak_product: PASS - Striped Indigo Glory Jacket displayed
product_detail_page.available_sizes: PASS - s, m, l, xl shown

responsive_design.mobile_375px: PASS - All 14 brand filters visible and functional

mocked_apis.whatsapp_otp: SANDBOX mode - OTP returned in response for testing
